JORDAN'S PERFUME

description.plain: A unisex eau de parfum blending woody, floral, and spicy notes for a confident, subtle scent.

unique_selling_points: Unisex fragrance crafted around a unique raw material discovered during a memorable London walk, inspired by Jordan's personality.
metadata.top_features:
Unisex formula: Suitable for all genders, offering versatile fragrance options
Woody, floral, and spicy scent profile: Provides a complex and lasting aroma
Available in multiple seasons: Designed to complement various weather and occasions
Gift-ready packaging: Ideal for special occasions and personal expression
metadata.tech_specs:
Fragrance Type: Eau de Parfum
Scent Notes: Woody, floral, spicy

Occasions: Everyday, special occasion, casual
Unisex: Yes

media.alt_text: JORDAN'S PERFUME Perfume sandalwood / ambergris / cedarwood / rose / jasmine

variants.title: JORDAN'S PERFUME

description.plain: London - October 2022 My wife and partner in Ranger Station (Jordan) and I were passing through London on our way to Scotland and Jordan commented on a fragrance she noticed while we were walking to dinner one night. Jordan is not someone who normally voices her love for a fragrance, so I took note. Fast forward to her birthday in March of '23. I wanted to make her a perfume. I went on a mission to find the main raw material in what she noticed. Finally I found it. I then proceeded to build a fragrance around that material that I felt embodied Jordan. Strong & Subtle. Confident but not overpowering. After countless compliments on both Jordan and myself wearing this unisex fragrance, we decided to make it available to everyone. Cheers, Steve

media.alt_text: JORDAN'S PERFUME Perfume sandalwood / ambergris / cedarwood / rose / jasmine

Your "go-to" signature fresh scent. ✨ LA VIDA BELLA (Elegant & Confident) Warm, rich, and luxurious vibe. Sparkling iris meets decadent praline sweetness—perfect for nights out and special events. 💕 VALENTINE GOLD (Sweet & Addictive) Sweet, playful, and a total compliment magnet. Perfect for: Dates, brunch, and whenever you want to grab attention. Why You’ll Love It We don't just sell bottles; we sell the feeling of being noticed. Here is why ScentBlooms customers keep coming back: ✨ Compliment Magnet: Scents that actually get noticed. ✨ Long-Lasting: 6-8 hours of noticeable presence. ✨ Designer Quality: Luxury notes without the price tag. ✨ Versatility: A complete fragrance wardrobe for any mood. ✨ Gift Ready: Beautiful bottles that look premium on your vanity. Why Women Are Switching To Our Signature Blends The era of overpaying for a brand name is over. Modern women are choosing ScentBlooms for high-end quality, exceptional longevity, and the ability to rotate signature scents daily without the $200 price tag. If you don't love your new signature scents, we'll make it right. No questions asked. Join 1,000+ Happy Women Discover why this set has become a viral must-have for fragrance lovers. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Frequently Asked Questions Are these full-size bottles? Yes! All three are full-size 3.4 oz (100ml) perfumes. This provides months of daily premium fragrance. How long does the scent last? These are high-concentration sprays designed to last 6 to 8 hours. Apply to pulse points for the best experience. What type of scents are included? This set includes a balanced mix of floral, sweet, and warm elegant tones, giving you a perfect option for every occasion from day to night.

products.title: Women’s Perfume Gift Set – 3 Pack Eau de Parfum (3.4 oz Each) – Long Lasting Floral & Sweet Fragrance Collection for Her – Includes Romantic, Valentine Pink & La Vida Bella

media.alt_text: Women’s Perfume Gift Set – 3 Pack Eau de Parfum (3.4 oz Each) – Long Lasting Floral & Sweet Fragrance Collection for Her – Includes Romantic, Valentine Pink & La Vida Bella

variants.title: Women’s Perfume Gift Set – 3 Pack Eau de Parfum (3.4 oz Each) – Long Lasting Floral & Sweet Fragrance Collection for Her – Includes Romantic, Valentine Pink & La Vida Bella

description.plain: Discover your signature scent with this elegant 3-piece women’s perfume set, featuring Romantic, Valentine Pink, and La Vida Bella. This collection is designed to offer a perfect balance of floral freshness, sweet femininity, and soft elegance, making it suitable for every occasion. Whether you're heading to work, enjoying a casual day out, or dressing up for an evening event, this set provides the right fragrance for every moment. Each perfume is formulated as an Eau de Parfum, delivering long-lasting performance while maintaining a refined and comfortable scent throughout the day. With full-size 3.4 oz bottles, this set offers excellent value and variety, making it perfect for both personal use and gifting. Elevate your fragrance collection with a combination of timeless and modern feminine scents. 3-Piece Women’s Fragrance Set - Includes Romantic, Valentine Pink, and La Vida Bella — a blend of soft floral, sweet, and elegant feminine scents. Long-Lasting Eau de Parfum Formula - Crafted for all-day wear with rich fragrance oils that provide a noticeable yet smooth scent. Floral, Sweet & Elegant Scent Profile - Perfect combination of romantic florals, soft sweetness, and warm undertones for a balanced fragrance experience. Versatile for Any Occasion - Ideal for daily wear, work, date nights, parties, and special occasions—one set for every mood. Perfect Gift for Women - Full-size bottles with beautiful packaging make this an ideal gift for birthdays, holidays, anniversaries, or self-care.

media.alt_text: Valentino Donna Born in Roma Intense Eau de Parfum for Women

variants.title: Valentino Donna Born in Roma Intense Eau de Parfum for Women

description.plain: A magnetic, floral and ambery women's fragrance that pushes vanilla and jasmine into a captivating embrace. An outstanding tribute to Rome and its sunsets, Donna Born In Roma Intense women's perfume aims at exalting your magnificent personality, celebrating a night in the eternal city. The long-lasting scent of this Donna Born in Roma fragrance amplifies the Born In Roma addiction by pushing powerful vanilla. This is enhanced by a trio of luminous jasmine and warm benzoin giving a seductive allure to the Aristo punks' evenings. This bewitching magnetic and floral Couture fragrance is designed for those who live intensely and passionately with a touch of extravagance.

description.plain: VALENTINO DONNA BORN IN ROMA INTENSE — Deep Floral Oriental Fragrance Family: Floral Oriental Key Notes: Orange Blossom, Jasmine, Tuberose; Vanilla, Patchouli, Amber Launched: 2021 EXPERIENCE IT: Imagine an elegant evening in Rome, rich orange blossom and intoxicating jasmine entwine with creamy tuberose, unfolding into a warm base of vanilla, patchouli, and amber. The scent is both sensual and sophisticated, blending brightness with deep, lasting warmth. PERFECT FOR Occasions: Evening events, romantic dinners, formal occasions Season: Autumn and Winter Gender: Women PERFORMANCE Longevity: 7–9 hours Projection: Moderate to strong - bold and enveloping AVAILABLE OPTIONS Size: 0.33 oz / 1.0 oz / 1.7 oz / 3.4 oz Eau de Parfum 10 ml / 30 ml / 50 ml / 100 ml Intense WHY YOU’LL LOVE IT: It’s a rich, elegant fragrance perfect for those who want to leave a lasting impression with a luxurious floral-oriental blend. MAKE IT YOURS: Spritz it when you want to feel confident, alluring, and wrapped in sophisticated warmth. LAYERING TIPS: To soften intensity: Pair with a vanilla or musk lotion. To add richness: Layer with a patchouli or amber base.

media.alt_text: Valentino Donna Born In Roma Intense For Women Eau de Parfum

variants.title: Valentino Donna Born In Roma Intense by Valentino

description.plain: Donna Born In Roma Intense Eau de Parfum is a magnetic floral ambery scent. A women's fragrance to glorify magnificent personalities. Enveloping vanilla is lifted by notes of bergamot and blackcurrant. Jasmine creates the heart of the scent, a luminous, creamy and modern florality. Warm notes of benzoin resin amplify the vanilla into extravagance. Valentino Donna Born In Roma Intense by Valentino is a Amber Floral fragrance for women. Valentino Donna Born In Roma Intense was launched in 2023. Valentino Donna Born In Roma Intense was created by Amandine Clerc Marie and Honorine Blanc. Top notes are Bourbon Vanilla and Amber. Middle note is Jasmine. Base note is Benzoin. Valentino Donna Born In Roma Intense fragrance samples available in 1ml, 3ml and 5ml sizes.

description.plain: An outstanding tribute to Rome and its sunsets, Born In Roma Intense aims at exalting your magnificent personality, celebrating a night in the eternal city. This fragrance allows cool kids to express themselves with intensity and experience life with abundance and duality Fragrance Details: The scent of this Born in Roma fragrance amplifies the Born In Roma addiction by pushing powerful vanilla. This is enhanced by a trio of luminous Jasmine and warm benzoin giving a seductive allure to the Aristo punks evenings. This bewitching magnetic and floral Couture fragrance is designed for those who live intensely and passionately with a touch of extravagance. Key Notes: Vanilla, Trio Jasmine, Benzoin

media.alt_text: Realtree Eau de Parfum by Jordan Outdoor

variants.title: Realtree Eau de Parfum by Jordan Outdoor

description.plain: Realtree Perfume by Jordan Outdoor, Jordan outdoor enterprises is the worlds leading designer of all things camouflage. from fashions to home decor and now fragrances. this is an earthy floral with fruit notes to refresh the blend.

media.alt_text: Realtree Eau de Parfum by Jordan Outdoor

variants.title: Realtree Eau De Parfum Spray By Jordan Outdoor

description.plain: Experience the Essence of the Outdoors Imagine stepping into a serene forest, where the air is rich with the scent of pine and the whispers of nature embrace you. With each spritz of Realtree Eau De Parfum Spray by Jordan Outdoor, you’re transported to that tranquil escape, evoking memories of adventurous days spent among the trees, where the beauty of the wild is captured in every note. This fragrance is not just a scent; it’s an invitation to revel in the great outdoors, beautifully blended for those who seek the thrill of nature’s lullaby. A Fragrance for Every Explorer Realtree Eau De Parfum is crafted for those who find peace in the great unknown, whether you’re a seasoned hunter, a weekend wanderer, or someone who cherishes the calming essence of nature. Each spray wraps you in warmth, akin to a cozy campfire on a cool evening, igniting a sense of adventure and freedom. As it lingers on your skin, you feel empowered, connected to the earth, and ready to take on the world with a spirit as boundless as the sky above.
